items.a: You need an invitation from an Owner/Admin of an organization. If you do not have access, ask to be invited.
items.q: how do I get access to the app?

items.a: Owner manages the organization and administrators. Administrator manages operational data (geofences, personnel, activities, assignments). Tracker is a field user who sends GPS points.
items.q: what is the difference between Owner, Administrator and Tracker?

items.a: Yes, Owners can work with several organizations and switch using the organization selector.
items.q: can I manage more than one organization?

items.a: The tracker may be offline, without location permissions, or without active assignment. Verify permissions and assignments.
items.q: why do I see "No recent data" in Tracker?

items.a: The frequency is defined in the assignment. The minimum allowed is 5 minutes to take care of battery and data.
items.q: how often is the location sent?

items.a: Yes, the tracker can store points and synchronize when connectivity returns (depending on your build and permissions).
items.q: does it work with weak signal?

items.a: Costs are calculated based on the allocations (hours) and the hourly rate configured for each activity.
Yes, reports are exported as CSV, which you can open in Excel or Google Sheets.
Yes. Use the filters in Reports and Dashboard Costs to focus by geofence(s), person(s), activity(ies) and dates.
items.q: can I filter by geofence, person, activity and date range?

items.a: Only the necessary points for tracking and validation by geofence. Access is controlled by roles and organization.
No. Data is isolated by organization (multi-tenant) and protected by database security rules.
items.q: can a tracker see data from other organizations?

faq.subtitle: Quick answers on invitations, roles, tracking, reporting and data privacy.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

instructions.bestPractice1Body: Name geofences and activities so that your team recognizes them instantly (Farm, Lot, Block, Task).
instructions.bestPractice2Body: Validate the entire flow with one person and one geofence before creating dozens of records.
instructions.bestPractice3Body: Close or deactivate old assignments so that the tracker follows only the current plan.
instructions.bestPractice4Body: Use a reasonable frequency. A very high frequency consumes more battery and mobile data.
instructions.recommendationBody: Start with 1 geofence and 1 tracker. When the flow works, scale up to more areas and people.
resultBullets: At least 1 geofence saved and visible on the map
Personnel registered and ready for assignments
Activities with currency and configured hourly rate
GPS points visible on Tracker / Tracking Dashboard
Cost reports and dashboard ready for export and analysis
instructions.resultIntro: Upon completion of the steps, your organization should have the following:

bullets: Use the organization selector to choose where you are going to work.
If you are an Owner, you can manage several organizations.
steps.title: Select your organization

bullets: Go to Geofence and draw the area on the map.
Give a clear name (Farm A, Lot 3, Floor 1, etc.).
Save and verify that it appears in Geofences.
steps.title: Create your first geofence

bullets: Go to Personnel and create the records of the people who will be working.
Use a valid email if you are going to invite them as trackers.
steps.title: Register your staff

bullets: Go to Activities and define tasks (Harvest, Irrigation, Maintenance...).
Configure currency and hourly rates for costing and reporting.
steps.title: Create activities and rates

bullets: Go to Assignments and link: Person + Activity + Geofence.
steps.title: Create assignments

bullets: Go to Invite tracker and send invitation by mail.
The guest can log in with Magic Link from the cell phone.
At startup, the tracker will send GPS points according to the assignment.
steps.title: Invita trackers (field telephones)

bullets: Open Reports to filter by geofence/person/activity and download CSV.
Open Dashboard Costs to view KPIs and graphs.
steps.title: Review reports and dashboard

disclosure.title: Background location
disclosure.body1: App Geofences collects your location even when the app is closed or the phone is locked to record positions and validate entry and exit of geofences during the working day.
disclosure.body2: This information is used only for operational purposes of the organization and is not shared with third parties or used for advertising. You can stop tracking by revoking your location permission or logging out.
